name: explaining-completed-work
description_en: Explain finished work with a Feynman-style walkthrough covering what changed, how it works, why it was chosen, and where the boundaries are.
description_zh: 用费曼式讲解回顾已完成的工作，说明改了什么、怎么工作的、为什么这样选、边界在哪里。

name: tmux-dispatch
description_en: Orchestrate multiple Claude Code processes via tmux for parallel batch task processing, with work-stealing scheduling and built-in quality gates.
description_zh: 通过 tmux 编排多个 Claude Code 进程来并行批量处理任务，支持 work-stealing 调度和内建质量门禁。

name: social-strategist
description_en: Analyze dialogue and chat screenshots for subtext, emotion, power dynamics, and reply strategies.
description_zh: 分析对话记录或聊天截图中的潜台词、情绪和权力动态，并给出多种回复策略。

name: structural-integrity-scan
description_en: Scan comparison-style articles for uneven comparisons, hidden asymmetry, and narrative-driven conclusions.
description_zh: 扫描并列对比型文章中的不对称比较、隐性偏差和被叙事推动的结论。

name: two-mirror-examples
description_en: Find persuasive examples for a thesis using distant and near mirrors that share the same underlying mechanism.
description_zh: 用远镜和近镜寻找能支撑论点的高洞见例子，重点是找同构机制而不是相似故事。

name: cdp-page-to-md
description_en: Fetch authenticated or JavaScript-rendered web pages via Chrome CDP and convert them into clean Markdown.
description_zh: 通过 Chrome CDP 获取需要登录或由 JavaScript 渲染的网页，并转换成干净的 Markdown。

name: zh-proofreading
description_en: Scan Chinese prose for typos, grammar issues, punctuation problems, and mixed Chinese-Latin formatting issues.
description_zh: 逐段扫描中文文章的错别字、语病、标点问题和中英混排格式问题。

name: secret-scan
description_en: Scan staged or changed files for leaked secrets before commit, push, or PR creation.
description_zh: 在提交、推送或创建 PR 之前扫描已暂存或已修改的文件，检查是否泄露密钥。

name: pr-review-autofix
description_en: Watch open PRs for AI code review comments and auto-fix them from local cron.
description_zh: 通过本地定时任务盯住打开的 PR，发现 AI code review 评论后自动修复。

name: monitoring-pr-ai-reviews
description_en: Use when implementation is already complete, a GitHub PR exists or must be opened, and follow-up work is still needed because Copilot or other AI review comments may arrive after the initial push.
description_zh: 当实现已经完成、GitHub PR 已存在或即将创建，而且还需要继续跟进 Copilot 或其他 AI review 评论时使用。

name: writing-commit
description_en: Create local git commits by deriving scope and message from repository evidence, with secret scanning and verification gates.
description_zh: 通过检查仓库状态自动推导提交范围和提交信息来创建本地 git commit，内置密钥扫描和验证门禁。

name: writing-contextual-todos
description_en: Write TODO docs as handoff artifacts with full context, acceptance criteria, and source attribution so future readers understand without chat history.
description_zh: 将 TODO 文档写成交接产物，包含完整上下文、验收标准和来源归属，让未来读者无需聊天记录即可理解。

name: creating-sourcecode-learning-sops
description_en: Create verified, multi-phase Study Operating Procedures for systematically learning a codebase feature, combining learning science with hands-on code verification.
description_zh: 创建经过验证的多阶段源码学习 SOP，结合学习科学和动手代码验证，系统性地学习代码库中的某个功能。

name: checking-upstream-before-work
description_en: Check upstream for overlapping open PRs and recent merges before starting implementation, bugfix, refactor, or investigation work.
description_zh: 开工前先检查上游仓库是否已有相关的 open PR 或近 5 天内合入的 PR，避免重复劳动或和他人冲突。

name: writing-open-source-prs
description_en: Draft, review, and update open source pull request descriptions so maintainers get issue context, behavior changes, tests, tradeoffs, and CI status without reading the diff first.
description_zh: 为开源项目的 Pull Request 撰写、复核和更新描述，让维护者无需先读 diff 就能掌握 issue 背景、行为变化、测试覆盖、取舍和 CI 状态。

name: judging-compounding-value
description_en: Judge whether an activity, skill, project, workflow, or career choice has compounding value or is mostly one-off consumption, using a six-dimension framework.
description_zh: 用六维框架判断一项活动、技能、项目、工作流或职业选择是否具有复利价值，还是主要属于一次性消耗。
